# Captains Fish and Chicken
> Fresh-to-order fried fish and chicken on the northeast side of Cedar Rapids.

## NAP
- Name: Captains Fish and Chicken
- Address: 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402
- Phone: +1-319-221-1040
- Email: owner@captainsfishandchicken.example

## Hours
Mon–Thu 11am–10pm · Fri–Sat 11am–11pm · Sun 11am–8pm

## Domain
https://captainsfishandchicken.example
